name: guga-reading
description: a online reading project composed by three frontend parts and one backend part
author: qianrenni

scripts.types: pnpm --filter @guga-reading/types run build && pnpm --filter @guga-reading/shares run build
scripts.dev:author: pnpm --filter @guga-reading/author run dev
scripts.build:author: pnpm --filter @guga-reading/author run build
scripts.build:all: pnpm --filter @guga-reading/author run build && pnpm --filter @guga-reading/user run build
